title: DentistUp
description: Bienvenue sur la Plateforme de Collaboration pour Dentistes ! Cette plateforme est conçue pour faciliter la collaboration entre les dentistes, leur permettant de partager des connaissances, d'échanger des idées et de travailler ensemble sur différents projets.

title: Batiment
description: Developed an elegant online platform for showcasing marble products using Next.js, emphasizing their natural beauty and unique characteristics. Designed a user-friendly interface with intuitive navigation to ensure a seamless browsing experience. Implemented robust backend systems for inventory management and order processing, optimizing business operations and enhancing customer service

title: ShopifyDashbaord
description: Created a comprehensive Shopify dashboard to display sales statistics and graphs using Next.js, providing clear insights into business performance. Designed an intuitive interface to facilitate easy access and analysis of key metrics. Integrated real-time data visualization tools to enhance decision-making and strategic planning
